subject: Public Health
title: The Future of Epidemiology
description: Learn The Future of Epidemiology in one minute.

hook.text: Genomics, AI, and real-time data are transforming epidemiology—from counting cases after the fact to predicting them.

buildup.text: Genomic epidemiology sequences pathogen DNA to track transmission chains—revolutionizing outbreak investigation.

discovery.text: Machine learning models now forecast disease outbreaks by analyzing weather, mobility, and social media data together.

twist.text: Big data brings big risks—privacy concerns, algorithmic bias, and digital divides threaten equitable use of these tools.

climax.text: The future epidemiologist will be part detective, part data scientist, and part ethicist—a hybrid role for a complex.

punchline.text: Epidemiology began with a map and a pump handle.

quiz.question: What does genomic epidemiology use to track outbreaks?
